text:
写过代码，也写过歌。
见过凌晨的数据，也见过山顶的日出。
想用设计温柔世界，用音乐记录时间。
爱猫，爱生活，爱一切安静而美好的事物。
—— Akito Lau


I've written code, and I've written songs.
I've seen data at dawn, and sunrises from mountaintops.
I want to soften the world with design, and capture time with music.
I love cats, I love life, and everything quiet and beautiful.
—— Akito Lau
